titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 228: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 228. (A.R. No. 131 of 1926.) TIRUVIḶAKKUḌI, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine, Maṇavāḷēśvara temple.

Records the construction of quarter portion of the stone temple for the god of Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi by the itinerant Vaḷañjiyar and Nānādēśiya-diśaiyāyittaiññūṟṟuvar (the mercantile communities), and the completion of the same by Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi Nambi alias Tiruvaiyāṟu Yōgiyār and his son Kaṟṟaḷippittar who was the clerk (Śrīkaraṇam) of the village. The two persons were fondly described as the children of the above mercantile bodies.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX. No. 459.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . ko[ pparakecaripaṉmakku] ṭṭu tiruveḻvikkuṭi Uṭaiyārkku
tirukkaṟṟaḷi Eṭukkiṉṟa tirukkaṟṟaḷiyil nālopāti tirukkaṟṟaḷi Eṭuppittār tiruveḻ
vikkuṭiyoṭu kūṭip piriyakkaṭava vaḷañciyarum nāṉāteciyit tikaiyāyirattaiññū
ṟṟuvarum Itticaiyāyirattaiññūṟṟuvar makkaḷḷumāy Eṭuppittār tiruveḻvi
kkuṭi nampiyākiya tiruvaiyāṟu yokiyārum Ivar makaṉ tiruveḻvikkuṭi śrī karaṇattirukkaṟṟa
ḷippittarum .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
